step.title: Generate Fixtures goal (single goal, phase=fixtures)
step.rule: All per-BC infrastructure goals MUST exist in goals.yaml before this step runs. If no infrastructure goals are found, ABORT with error.
This is a SINGLE goal — never split per-BC. All fixtures load together because they share FK dependencies.
depends_on MUST include EVERY infrastructure goal ID — dynamically collected from goals.yaml, not hardcoded (G-03).

substep.title: Collect all infrastructure goal IDs
substep.action: Read goals.yaml from disk. Filter all goal entries where phase=infrastructure. Collect their goal IDs into INFRA_GOAL_IDS list.

check.action: ABORT with error: "No infrastructure goals found in goals.yaml — cannot generate fixtures goal without schema dependencies"

substep.rule: This MUST be dynamic — BC count varies per project. Never hardcode goal IDs.

substep.title: Build entity inventory from domain model
substep.action: Read docs/architecture/domain-model.md. Extract all aggregate/entity names across all BCs from AGGREGATE_MAP (built in Step 0).
For each entity, build fixture class path: contexts/{BC}/src/Bundle/DataFixtures/{Entity}Fixtures.php
Additionally include UserFixtures (requires UserPasswordHasherInterface injection) — one per BC that has auth-related entities, or a shared UserFixtures if auth is centralized.
Read docs/architecture/api-endpoints.md to identify which entities have list/search endpoints — these need page_size+1 records for pagination testing (FX-04).

substep.title: Resolve fixtures template
substep.action: Attempt to read the language-specific overlay template first, then fall back to base:
Store the resolved template content as FIXTURES_TEMPLATE. Record which tier was used (overlay or base).
substep.rule: Fixture class patterns (DependentFixtureInterface, idempotency strategy, CLI commands) MUST come from the resolved template, not hardcoded in this XML.

substep.title: Compose acceptance criteria (FX-01..FX-06)
substep.action: Build ACCEPTANCE array with all 6 fixture criteria from docs/task-plan-spec.md:698-706:

criteria.item: Fixture class exists for every aggregate/entity that E2E tests reference
Fixtures create test users matching docs/architecture/test-environment.md credentials — never hardcoded
Fixtures are idempotent — running doctrine:fixtures:load twice doesn't fail
Fixtures create page_size+1 records per entity for list/pagination tests
Fixtures depend on schema being created — migrations applied first via depends_on

substep.rule: All 6 criteria must be present as individual strings in the acceptance array — no omissions, no merging.

substep.title: Compose validation commands
substep.action: Build VALIDATE array with commands that verify fixtures work correctly:

commands.cmd: Verify fixture class count matches entity count from domain-model.md

substep.rule: Validation must prove idempotency by running the load command twice sequentially — both must exit 0.

substep.title: Compose context with Investigation Config and fan-out hint
substep.action: Build CONTEXT string with these sections:
substep.section: Fixtures goal creates test data for all entities across all bounded contexts. Single goal because fixtures share FK dependencies and must load in correct order via DependentFixtureInterface. All entity names from docs/architecture/domain-model.md. Test user credentials from docs/architecture/test-environment.md (never hardcoded). Fixture class patterns from {{FIXTURES_TEMPLATE}} (DependentFixtureInterface, #[AsFixture(group: 'test')], idempotent purge, page_size+1 records). Depends on ALL infrastructure goals: {{INFRA_GOAL_IDS}} — these provide Doctrine mappings, migrations, and custom DBAL types.

section.name: fan-out-hint
section.hint: single-task — all fixtures must load together since they share FK dependencies. Doctrine's DependentFixtureInterface handles internal ordering.

section.name: investigation-config

investigator.name: Fixture load
investigator.pass: Exit code 0 — all fixtures loaded successfully
investigator.fail: Non-zero exit, missing table, FK constraint violation, or missing service

investigator.name: Idempotency check
investigator.pass: Both runs exit code 0 — purge-and-reload produces identical state
investigator.fail: Second run fails (constraint violation, duplicate key, or stale reference)

investigator.name: Fixture class coverage
investigator.commands: For every entity in docs/architecture/domain-model.md, verify contexts/{BC}/src/Bundle/DataFixtures/{Entity}Fixtures.php exists
investigator.pass: All fixture files present — one per testable entity
investigator.fail: Missing fixture class for one or more entities

section.rule: Exactly 3 investigators (GM-08 allows 2-4). Each has type, commands, and pass/fail criteria (GM-09).

substep.title: Compose not-in-scope
substep.value: Production seed data, performance benchmarks, event listener test data, fixture performance optimization — production seeding is a separate concern; event listener test data added by event listener goals if needed.

substep.title: Call goal-create MCP
substep.action: Call the goal-create MCP tool with these parameters:

params.param: Create test fixtures for all entities with test users and pagination data
ACCEPTANCE array from substep 3.17.4 (exactly 6 items, FX-01..FX-06)
CONTEXT string from substep 3.17.6 (purpose + fan-out hint)

Array of {name,type,paths,commands,pass,fail,condition?} objects built from substep 3.17.6's 3 investigators (2-4; types from the Reference Table). Omit conditional investigators whose condition is false.
INFRA_GOAL_IDS — ALL infrastructure goal IDs collected in substep 3.17.1

substep.rule: Description is 73 characters — within the 120-char limit (MaxGoalDescriptionLength).
max_retries=3 (G-11) — fixture issues are typically FK ordering or missing entity, fixable in few cycles.
depends_on MUST be the FULL INFRA_GOAL_IDS list — never just the last one (G-03).

check.action: Print error with full context and ABORT.
Print: "Fixtures created: goal-P+1 (phase=fixtures, depends_on={{INFRA_GOAL_IDS}}) with 3 investigators, single-task fan-out, max_retries=3"
